creator: nitin.gupta981@gmail.com
text:
Hi Hans 

I wanted to make dynamic mostly below 3 fields 

VendorID 
ProductID 
.bcdUSB

Also is it possible to read trough controller itself all the field 

I tried to send get device desc request but got the kernel fault since already we are in same control path 

usb_process ---> usb_alloc_device-->usbd_setup_device_desc-->usbd_req_ge_get_desc->xhci_roothub_exec --->  here i was calling again usbd_req_ge_get_desc
